questions.question: What is the primary goal of classification evaluation metrics?
keyPoints: To measure the performance of a classification model

questions.question: What is accuracy in classification evaluation metrics?
keyPoints: Out of all instances in the test dataset

questions.question: What is the purpose of using a confusion matrix in classification evaluation metrics?
keyPoints: To provide a visual representation of the model's performance
To identify true positives, false positives, true negatives, and false negatives

questions.question: Compare and contrast macro and micro averaging in classification evaluation metrics.
keyPoints: Macro averaging calculates the metric for each class separately and then averages them
Micro averaging calculates the metric globally for all classes
